title: Retro Soccer
description:
Retro Soccer is a highly playable well paced arcade action soccer game inspired by soccer games from the 90s like "Sensible Soccer" but with a fun low-poly 3d art style. Compete in friendlies, cups or league tournaments and classic tournaments such as the 86 World Cup, Euro 88 and more in single player or against friends in local multiplayer.

Play Modes:

• Friendly Match

• Cup Tournaments

• League Tournaments

• Classic Tournaments

• Single or local multiplayer

Current features include:

• Simple controls for easy to pickup casual players

• Retro style gameplay with a fun visual style

• Slick passing, Slide tackles, diving headers and rasping shots

• Challenging AI with team skill based on FIFA World Rankings

• Change your formations and tactics

With more features to come during Early Access Development.
description_short: Retro Soccer is a highly playable well paced arcade action soccer game inspired by classics from the 90s with a visual upgrade. Compete in classic tournaments from the 86 World Cup to Euro 96 with teams having their own skill level based on FIFA world rankings of the time.
